data.title: Forrester: B2B buying groups expand as they question AI
data.description: When a purchase includes generative AI features — which often require additional evaluation and cross-functional input — the buying group doubles in size compared with purchases that do not include such features.

data.title: Rezolve Ai closes $250 million in new funding
data.description: Rezolve said it designed its technology to help retailers use artificial intelligence (AI) for functions such as personalized search, product recommendations and checkout.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why AI choices, charges and friction all matter for returns
data.description: In ecommerce, returns policies remain an important factor in managing costs, but new survey results from FedEx show what seems to matter most for younger shoppers.

data.title: PayPal to acquire Cymbio to expand merchant reach into AI shopping channels
data.description: Technology companies including Microsoft, OpenAI, Google and Perplexity are adding shopping and product recommendation capabilities to their AI assistants, prompting merchants and commerce providers to adapt to new ways consumers find and buy products.

data.title: Why Fastenal is maintaining focus on digital commerce
data.description: The results underscore Fastenal’s shift toward a digitally integrated operating model.
